education.degree: Master of Business Administration -- Specialization: AI & ML
Postgraduate Certificate in Big Data Analytics
relevant_coursework: Big Data with Hadoop and Spark

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

bullets: Engineered a Python-based automation framework that reduced ticket resolution latency by 250\%, saving approximately 40 engineering hours per week across the global support team.

Optimized complex SQL queries and database indexing strategies on MS SQL Server for datasets exceeding 10M+ rows, achieving a 40\% improvement in query execution time and ensuring 99.9\% data reliability for mission-critical business reports.
Designed and deployed 12+ automated SAP workflows using Python and ABAP, eliminating manual data entry for finance and logistics teams and reducing human error by 30\%.
Strengthened enterprise data security by conducting rigorous audit cycles and implementing access-control protocols, reducing system vulnerabilities by 25\% across 3 SAP modules.
Collaborated with a cross-functional team of 8 engineers across 3 time zones to deliver quarterly platform upgrades, consistently meeting 100\% of sprint deadlines.
Partnered with senior consultants on high-level design and implementation of contract lifecycle management (CLM) product features for enterprise clients.
Developed and tested secure, scalable product modules using .NET, contributing to a feature release adopted by 3 Fortune 500 clients.
Documented technical specifications and created workflow diagrams for 5+ product features, accelerating the onboarding process for new engineering hires.

projects.name: AI Job Application Pipeline
projects.tech_stack: Python, Google Sheets API, Jinja2, LaTeX, LLM APIs
bullets: Architected an end-to-end automated job application pipeline in Python that scrapes listings, tailors resumes via LLM-powered bullet generation, compiles LaTeX PDFs, and logs applications to Google Sheets.
Implemented Jinja2-based dynamic template rendering to inject AI-tailored bullet points into a LaTeX resume template, enabling per-application customization at scale.

projects.name: TEF Master Cloud
projects.tech_stack: Python, Streamlit, Google Gemini, Ollama, Firebase Firestore, DuckDuckGo Search API
bullets: Built a hybrid AI-powered language exam prep platform using Streamlit, featuring auto-switching between local Ollama (Gemma 3 27B) and cloud Google Gemini backends based on runtime environment detection.

Engineered a 30-week structured curriculum engine with gamification (XP, streaks, levels), dynamic grammar drills, and AI-generated reading comprehension modules, backed by Firebase Firestore for persistent progress tracking.

Integrated a TEF Writing Clinic that evaluates essays against official TEF rubrics (Structure, Vocabulary, Grammar) using LLM-based scoring, delivering line-by-line corrections and a score out of 450.

projects.name: AI Newsletter Automation Bot
projects.tech_stack: Python, Google GenAI SDK, feedparser, BeautifulSoup, Discord Webhooks, GitHub Actions
bullets: Developed a serverless data pipeline that ingests content from 3 AI newsletter RSS feeds, scrapes full article bodies with BeautifulSoup, and produces structured 5-minute digest summaries using Google Gemini.
Automated daily execution via GitHub Actions cron workflows, delivering rich-embed formatted newsletters to Discord channels with zero hosting cost and 100\% uptime reliability.
Designed modular source-adapter architecture supporting RSS, web scraping, and direct URL fetching, enabling seamless addition of new newsletter sources without code changes.

projects.name: AI Assignment Helper
projects.tech_stack: TypeScript, React 19, Vite, Google GenAI SDK, jsPDF, html2canvas
bullets: Built a full-stack AI-powered assignment assistant using React 19 and TypeScript, integrating the Google GenAI SDK to provide real-time, context-aware academic guidance and structured output generation.
Implemented PDF export functionality using jsPDF and html2canvas, enabling users to download AI-generated solutions as professionally formatted documents.
